caption:
🌙✨ Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri! ✨🌙

Wishing all our members, friends, and martial arts enthusiasts a joyous and blessed Raya! 🥋💪 May this festive season bring you strength, harmony, and prosperity—both in training and in life.

Let’s continue to embody the values of respect, discipline, and perseverance, just as we do in Wing Chun Do. Enjoy the celebrations, and don’t forget to stay sharp! 

Thank you!

“Refine Limits, Embrace Growth”

Wing Chun Do Club 2024/2025

[HAPPY MALAYSIA DAY 2024]

Dear all,

Gathering today in honor of Malaysia Day 2024, we join hands to celebrate the intricate blend of our nation’s history and its diversity.

As we take a moment to ponder over our journey, let us pay tribute to the sacrifices and contributions that have molded our nation into the form it takes today.

Warmest wishes on Malaysia Day 2024!

Thank you!

“Redefine Limits, Embrace Growth”

Wing Chun Do Club 2023/2024

Dear all,

On this meaningful day, the MMU Wing Chun Do Club proudly celebrates the unity and strength that define our beloved nation. Malaysia Day is not just a reminder of history, but also a symbol of harmony, respect, and togetherness among people of different backgrounds. Just as Wing Chun Do teaches us discipline, balance, and resilience, our country too has grown stronger through the values of perseverance and unity.

May this 68th Malaysia Day inspire us to continue embracing diversity, appreciating our cultural heritage, and working hand in hand for a brighter and more prosperous Malaysia. Together, let us keep the spirit of unity alive—because when we stand as one, nothing is impossible. 🇲🇾

Thank you!

”Redefine Limits, Embrace Growth“

Wing Chun Do Club 2024/2025

Dear all,

Wing Chun Do Club is delighted to announce that we will be having our AGM physically and it is opened to all members of Wing Chun Do Club. Hence, our members are warmly welcome to join us!

We will be introducing our committee for the new term. Hence, do not miss out on the opportunity to suggest any exciting events that you have in your mind. Let us make this year an exciting academic year for you and all of us.

The details of the Annual General Meeting (AGM) are as follows:
Date : 19 Dec 2024 (Thursday)
Time : 8.00 p.m. - 10.00 p.m.
Venue : MSMX 2001 

Thank you.

🏮 WING CHUN CLUB - AGM 2025 ANNOUNCEMENT 🏮

Hey MMU Wing Chun Club Members! It’s that time of year again.

You are cordially invited to our Annual General Meeting (AGM)! This is your chance to hear about the club’s progress, our future plans, and to have your voice heard. Let’s shape the future of our club together!

📅 DATE: 26th November 2025 (Wednesday)
⏰ TIME: 8:00 PM - 10:00 PM
📍 VENUE: MSMX 2001 (CLC)

Your participation is crucial! We’ll be discussing:
✨ Year in Review
✨ Financial Report
✨ Upcoming Events & Plans
✨ Committee Elections
✨ Open Floor for Your Ideas!

Let’s build a stronger, even more amazing community. See you there!

-Redefine Limits, Embrace Growth-

[HAPPY DEEPAVALI]

Dear all!

Deepavali, the vibrant Festival of Lights, marks a time when communities come together to celebrate the victory of light over darkness, good over evil, and wisdom over ignorance. Observed in autumn in the northern hemisphere and spring in the southern, it is a cherished festival filled with joy and unity.

May this Deepavali bring you abundant happiness, peace, and prosperity!

Thank you!

”Redefine Limits, Embrace Growth“

Wing Chun Do Club 2023/2024

That’s a wrap for our Club & Society Registration Week performance! 🔥

Huge thanks to everyone who stopped by to watch us flow, strike, and demonstrate the power of Wing Chun Do. It’s not just martial arts—it’s about control, confidence, and community.

Want to try it for yourself?

➡️ Swipe up / Link in bio to join our beginner’s session!

➡️ Follow @wingchundoclubmmu for updates and training session announcement.

"Redefine Limits, Embrace Growth"

P/S: A little nervous posting our first reel! 🙏 Your support means everything. Like, share, or follow if you want to see more of our club’s adventures.

⚠️ DISCLAIMER: This is a demonstration by trained members in a controlled environment. Wing Chun Do involve martial arts techniques that should only be practiced under the direct supervision of a qualified instructor in a safe training setting.

#WingChunDo #CSRW #UniversityLife #LearnMartialArts #SelfDefence #JoinOurClub #Performance

[REGISTRATION FOR CONFERENCE OF SELF IMPROVEMENT & SELF MASTERY]

Dear all,

The Wing Chun Do Club (WCD) in collaboration with Bazi & Metaphysics Community (BMC) is thrilled to announce an event namely “Conference of Self Improvement & Self Mastery” organized by Joey Yap Consulting Group (JYG), an international life transformation consulting firm. This is an internationalized based event aiming to cultivate self improvement and self mastery. Furthermore, it is structured to guide us through a holistic approach to personal development, encompassing various aspects of our life, including mental, emotional, physical and spiritual well-being. 

The details of the event are as follows:
Date: 18 January 2024 (Saturday) and 19 January 2024 (Sunday)
Departure Date: 17 January 2024 (Friday)
Departure Time: 2.00 p.m.
Venue: Malaysia International Trade and Exhibition Centre (MITEC), Kuala Lumpur
Transportation & Accommodation: Free of Charge
Registration: Free of Charge

Two options are provided for the participants:
Option 1 : Work & Engage
- Work on exciting tasks
- Gain event experience
- Allowance of RM120.00 per day

Option 2 : Volunteer & Learn
- Get exclusive access to learn and listen to the content which worth RM 256.00
- Gain experience in organizing international event

For those who are interested in joining this event, kindly submit your application via this Google Form below. Seats are limited to 15 participants only.

Google Form: https://forms.gle/sUyDhZu8xPzchWxr6

**Disclaimer : For those who have registered to join this event but later unable to join will be penalized RM 300.00**

For any further inquiries, please do not hesitate to contact:
Ngiaw San Jack (Director) - +60 12-800 2278 
Torres Wong Jun Hung (Co-Director/Advisor) - +60 16-593 9802

Thank you.

“Redefine Limits, Embrace Growth”

Wing Chun Do Club 2024/2025

[APPRECIATION POST FOR THE CONFERENCE OF SELF IMPROVEMENT & SELF MASTERY - FSA 2024]

Dear all,

Wing Chun Do Club 2023/2024 and Bazi & Metaphysis Community have successfully executed the Conference of Self Improvement & Self Mastery on 27 January 2024 and 28 January 2024 (Saturday and Sunday), with the initiation to bring MMU students to join as the event crew.

What began as a mere vision evolved into a profound reality, thanks to the collective efforts of the dedicated committee behind the scenes. It is inspiring to witness how a shared vision can transform into a tangible and unforgettable experience for all involved.

Furthermore, the attendance of individuals who embraced the spirit of the occasion. The enthusiastic energy of the participants, and the positive interactions all contributed to the vibrant atmosphere that made the event truly special.

As the conference unfolded, we felt an overwhelming sense of gratitude for stumbling upon this impromptu gathering of minds. The speaker, with his wisdom and insight, had given speeches filled with knowledge, connection, and the reminder that self-improvement is a journey worth embracing. To each committee member, speaker, and attendee, we express our deepest thanks for being an integral part of this unforgettable experience.

We attach herewith the photos of the Conference of Self Improvement & Self Mastery - FSA 2024.

Thank you!

“Redefine Limits, Embrace Growth”

Wing Chun Do Club 2023/2024

[RECRUITMENT OF COMMITTEE FOR MARTIAL ARTS SOCIAL NIGHT 2024]

Dear all, 

Martial Arts Alliance from Multimedia University Melaka, which was formed by the Wing Chun Do Club, Aikido Club, Persatuan Seni Silat Cekak Pusaka Ustaz Hanafi, and Judo Club, is going to organize an unforgettable night of harmony where martial arts and music converge in the spectacular event, ”Martial Arts Social Night 2024.“ 

This will be a unique fusion night that promises an exhilarating experience, blending the precision and discipline of martial arts with the soul-stirring melodies of music.

It is glad to announce that we are currently recruiting for various positions:

1. Co-Director
2. Programme Division
3. Multimedia Division
4. Publicity Division
5. Logistics Division
6. Sponsorship Division
7. Technical Division 

The recruitment and interview details are as follows:
Recruitment Period: 25 May 2024 (Saturday) - 29 May 2024 (Wednesday)
Interview Dates: 30 May 2024 (Thursday) & 31 May 2024 (Friday)
Interview Time: 7.00 p.m. - 10.00 p.m. 
Interview Venue: TBA 

If you are passionate about martial arts, music, and event management, here‘s your chance to be a part of an unforgettable night where martial arts meet music in perfect harmony! 

Recruitment form link:
https://forms.office.com/r/t5x90XuT3z 

Don’t miss this chance to fill out this recruitment form and become part of our committee to contribute to an epic fusion of martial arts and music!✨

For more details, do not hesitate to contact:
Director - Torres Wong Jun Hung +60 16-593 9802
Co-Director - Sworna Veena +60 11-2114 5131

Let‘s create an evening full of energy, rhythm, and unity together! 💪🎶 

Thank you.

Martial Arts Alliance 2024/2025,
Multimedia University Melaka.

#MartialArtsAlliance #MartialArtsSocialNight2024 #JoinUs #EventRecruitment

[INTRODUCTION OF MULTIMEDIA UNIVERSITY WING CHUN DO CLUB]

Dear all,

We are excited to introduce the Wing Chun Do Club, a martial arts based club at MMU Melaka, dedicated to the art of Wing Chun.

Wing Chun Do Club's objectives revolve around self-defense, physical fitness, character building, mental well-being, empowerment, personal growth, martial arts ethics, camaraderie, and preservation of the Wing Chun tradition. By adhering to these objectives, the club provides its members with a platform for growth, development, and the perpetuation of the profound art of Wing Chun.

Join us in redefining limits and embracing growth as we cultivate a supportive and inclusive space for all members. Wing Chun Do Club wishes you all the best in discovering the power of Wing Chun and unlocking your potential.

Thank you!

"Redefine Limits, Embrace Growth"

Wing Chun Do Club 2022/2023

[REBOOT OF MULTIMEDIA UNIVERSITY WING CHUN DO CLUB]

Dear all,

We are thrilled to announce the long-awaited return of the Wing Chun Do Club at MMU Melaka, better and stronger than ever before!

Prepare to immerse yourself in the essence of Wing Chun, a traditional Chinese martial art known for its swift, efficient, and practical combat techniques. With our reboot, we are committed to preserving the authentic teachings while infusing fresh perspectives to meet the demands of modern martial arts. From beginners to advanced practitioners, we welcome all levels to join us on this exhilarating journey of self-discovery and growth.

At Wing Chun Do Club, we believe that a strong community spirit is the key to success. Together, we will foster a supportive and inclusive environment where everyone can learn, share, and inspire one another to reach new heights in their martial arts journey.

Thank you!

"Redefine Limits, Embrace Growth"

Wing Chun Do Club 2022/2023

[RECRUITMENT OF MEMBERS FOR WING CHUN DO CLUB 2022/2023 FOR TRIMESTER 3]

Greetings to everyone!

Wing Chun Do Club is pleased to announce that we are all set to embrace fresh members into our Wing Chun Do Club. Do not pass up on this moment to enroll and become a part of our close-knit group!

We invite you to become a member and experience the grace of Wing Chun, regardless of your previous familiarity with the martial art. Seize the opportunity to discover your innate abilities and skills in Wing Chun, make sure you do not allow this chance to elude you!

If you are interested to join our society, do visit our registration booth at CLC Walkway from 21 August 2023 (Monday) - 23 August 2023 (Wednesday) to know more information. Our registration session will be closed on 23 August 2023 (Wednesday) at 5.00 p.m.

Join us now by filling in the google form through the link below!
